gpt55_review_summary: Initial GPT-5.5 review found invalid UTF-8 sidecars could raise instead of returning failed evidence. I caught UnicodeDecodeError, added the b'\xff' regression, reran focused/full tests and build, and re-review returned clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_pr_evidence.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review found invalid UTF-8 handling gap; fixed with regression test and re-review returned clean
what_changed: Added public PR evidence file and directory validation helpers.
Added a repository gate that validates checked-in pr-evidence JSON sidecars.
Exposed the helpers through document_kv_cache and legacy root exports.
why: PR and release traceability sidecars should be machine-checkable before they are attached to release bundles or used as governance evidence.
